content.en:
Ye Tian was able to deal with these Yuanxia mother beasts, although he had a little advantage in the dimensional rules, it was a little difficult to kill these Yuanxia mother beasts.

However, his original intention was not to kill these Yuanxia mother beasts, but to snatch the Yuanxia mother liquor.

Bang!!!

These Yuanxia female beasts were knocked away by Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to seize the opportunity.

Suddenly, his other copy bodies intercepted these Yuanxia mother beasts one after another, and the last copy body snatched the Yuanxia mother liquor.

"Give it to me!"

Ye Tian's dimensional rules turned into a void hand, directly snatching away these Yuanxia mother liquor.

There wasn't much Yuanxia mother liquor here, so it was seized in an instant, and then quickly and quickly escaped.

These Yuanxia female beasts couldn't catch up with Ye Tian, and they were quickly escaped by Ye Tian~.

In the days of that day, Ye Tian continued to look for Yuanxia mother liquor, and found a few more places, which were also forcibly snatched - Yuanxia mother liquor.

However, the Yuanmu River is indeed large enough, and if you want to find all the Yuanxia Mother Liquor, it will take a lot of time.

So on this day, Ye Tian descended to the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein again.

Since he had the token given by the mysterious Eighth Realm woman, this time he didn't need to go through the dimensional passage of the Purgatory Holy Sect, and he directly shuttled to the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, and the Purgatory Holy Sect didn't know about it.

......

"Senior, I'm here!"

Ye Tian said.

"Oh, did you get Yuanxia mother liquor?"

The mysterious woman was surprised, it hadn't been too long, and it had only been dozens of domain yuan years, and this time was nothing to her.

She originally estimated that Ye Tian would need at least a few thousand domain yuan time to be able to create the supreme mastery of the Five Realms by herself, so as to defeat those Yuanxia mother beasts and obtain some Yuanxia mother liquor, but now it seems that she is underestimating Ye Tian.

Of course, it is also possible that Ye Tian himself is about to comprehend the supreme mastery of the Five Realms, so that he can comprehend the supreme mastery of the Five Realms so quickly.

Wow!

Ye Tian took out these Yuanxia mother liquors.

"Sure enough, it's Yuanxia Mother Liquor!" The mysterious woman was very satisfied, and immediately waved her hand, took away half of the Yuanxia Mother Liquor, and took out a secret method and transmitted it to Ye Tian: "This is a secret method I created in the Spell Spirit Gold Ore Vein - Yuan Spirit Secret Method, which can resist the power of the Spell Spirit Gold Ore Vein, at least ten times easier, and then you use these Yuanxia Mother Liquor to comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, you can comprehend for a longer time." "

"Thank you, senior!"

Ye Tian was grateful.

Immediately, he took the remaining half of Yuanxia's mother liquid to comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone.

In fact, he can also use Yuanxia Mother Liquid, he can always use the copy body to comprehend, and when it is scrapped, it will be re-condensed, but the location of the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone is too close to the mysterious woman, and he can't sense the location of the mysterious woman, but the mysterious woman can sense him.

So.

He didn't want to be exposed, so he could only use Yuanxia's mother liquor to practice.

He came to the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, swallowed a drop of Yuanxia Mother Liquid, and then practiced according to the Yuan Spirit Secret Method, and soon formed a faint layer of Yuan Spirit light on the surface of his body, thus protecting his body and resisting the power from the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

Moreover, Yuan Xia's mother liquor is still constantly repairing the injuries in his body that have been affected by the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, which allows him to comprehend the rules of the dimension here for a long time.

"Then comprehend the rules of the dimension!"

Ye Tian's replica body did not use multi-dimensional wisdom light, but the replica body from the outside world fully cooperated with this replica body, constantly using multi-dimensional wisdom light, and also urging the Yinxuan Illustrated Book to analyze and comprehend.

That's it.

Ye Tian's perception of the rules of the dimension was improving at an incredible speed.

I don't know how long it has been.

Finally, Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the eleven dimensions.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the eleven-fold dimensional rules erupted and could not be hidden.

"This little guy has comprehended the rules of the eleven dimensions so quickly, and it seems that he is close to breaking through, so his comprehension should be good!" muttered the mysterious woman.

She didn't pay much attention to it, it was just eleven dimensional rules, and it was nothing to her.

She continued to close her eyes and meditate, trying to figure out how to suppress the power of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein here, as well as repair her injuries.

But the treasures that can repair her injuries are very rare, the items on her body have been destroyed, and Ye Tian's strength is too weak, it is impossible to obtain things that restore her injuries, and it is extremely good to be able to obtain the Yuan Mother.

Therefore, she also knew that she couldn't count on Ye Tian at the moment, so she could only have a good relationship with Ye Tian and cultivate more, hoping that Ye Tian was not a white-eyed wolf, and that she could really bring her some treasure resources for her to heal in the future.

this day.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's body was permeated with twelve dimensional rules, which shocked the mysterious woman.

"This is the rule of the twelvefold dimension, so quickly, he broke through?Even with the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, it shouldn't be so fast, could it be that he used some kind of treasure or secret technique that can seriously destroy his potential? "

The mysterious woman was a little puzzled, could it be that she really had such a genius with such a perceptive understanding?

If Ye Tian was really so rebellious, maybe she had the hope of seeing revenge from Ye Tian.

But it was impossible for her to tell Ye Tian the truth now, unless Ye Tian's strength was stronger, at least reaching the invincible strength of the seventh realm, before she was qualified to truly cooperate with her.

......

"Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, the effect is too good, and there are almost no side effects, there are such treasures in the twelfth dimension!"

Ye Tian was excited.

At this moment, he was very grateful to the Extinction Realm Lord, if he hadn't met him, he might not have come here at all, and he wouldn't have had such an opportunity.

He continued to comprehend that those Yuanxia mother liquids were enough to be used for a long time.

After several more domain yuan years, Ye Tian finally broke through again and comprehended the rules of the thirteen dimensions.

It was at this time that the transmission of the mysterious woman came.

"It's time for you to go out and get some Yuanxia Mother Liquid, which was almost all used by me to repair the damage caused by the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, and is now about to run out. "

The mysterious woman said.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded, he actually wanted to continue cultivating, after all, he still had a lot of Yuanxia Mother Liquid, and his consumption rate was not as fast as that of the mysterious woman, but the mysterious woman urgently needed this thing, so he naturally wanted to collect it.

Immediately, Ye Tian went out.

And after going out, he went straight to the Yuanxia Mother River.

In these years, he has also been collecting information about Yuanxia's mother liquor, and now he has located eight places, and he can directly snatch the spoon.
